items.problem: project knowledge chunk for tau: Current Understanding (1)
items.solution:
- Project initialized, knowledge tracking started
- Tau is a fork of alejandro-ao/tau being hardened into a goal-locked agentic harness. Current local slices add Loop2-compatible run receipts plus minimal model-facing contracts for subagent receipts, generated tickets, handoffs, and human-only goal changes. Tau derives GitHub labels deterministically instead of asking model agents to duplicate label/projection fields.

items.decisions:
| Date | Decision | Why |
|------|----------|-----|
| 2026-06-27 | Initialize project knowledge | Enable shared human/agent context |
| 2026-06-27 | Use a fork at grahama1970/tau rather than a new unrelated repo | The project already has upstream history at alejandro-ao/tau, so a fork preserves attribution and makes future upstream comparison/pull possible. |
| 2026-06-27 | Keep GitHub mutation out of the first harness slices | Current proof is schema, validator, fixture, and deterministic projection only; live issue creation should come after the contracts are accepted. |

items.understanding:
- Project initialized, knowledge tracking started
- Tau is a fork of alejandro-ao/tau being hardened into a goal-locked agentic harness. Current local slices add Loop2-compatible run receipts plus minimal model-facing contracts for subagent receipts, generated tickets, handoffs, and human-only goal changes. Tau derives GitHub labels deterministically instead of asking model agents to duplicate label/projection fields.

items.problem: project knowledge chunk for tau: Infrastructure State (1)

meta.q:
title: Self-fix queue proof A: repair tracked probe
state: OPEN

Type: bug
Target: tests/fixtures/self_fix_queue_probe_a.py
Observed: STATUS remains set to bug for the controlled repeated-queue proof.
Expected: Tau self-fix cron leases this ticket, runs Memory-first intake, calls streaming Scillm coder/reviewer loop, changes STATUS to fixed, commits/pushes the scoped change, comments proof, and closes the ticket.
Required proof: self-fix poll receipt, ticket repair receipt, Memory intent/recall receipts, streaming Scillm coder/reviewer receipts with event logs, py_compile exit 0, pushed commit, proof comment.

```json
{
  "schema": "tau.self_fix_repair_request.v1",
  "request": "Repair repeated queue probe A.",
  "target_file": "tests/fixtures/self_fix_queue_probe_a.py",
  "find_text": "STATUS = \"bug\"",
  "replace_text": "STATUS = \"fixed\"",
  "verification_commands": ["python -m py_compile tests/fixtures/self_fix_queue_probe_a.py"],
  "commit_message": "Resolve self-fix queue probe A"
}
```

runtime_pressure.recommended_action: No active persisted runtime pressure detected.
